steps.title: Track the purpose
steps.content: The first sentence gives Namara's belief: Elvis's music should be understood as an anthology shaped by many musical influences. The next sentence describes Namara naming a course Elvis as Anthology. The transition must show that the course title was an action taken to put that belief into practice.

steps.title: Choose the action transition
steps.content: Choice A only adds another point, but the second sentence is not separate from the first. Choice B signals a summary, which does not fit an action based on a belief. Choice C signals restatement, but the course title is an application of the idea, not just a rewording. The remaining transition shows action taken toward an end. The answer is D.
